# Gas Saturation

**Summary**: The fraction of pore space occupied by gas.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-al-dawood|Al-Dawood, 2019]] estimated gas-saturation to determine pay zone potential.

## Scientific Context

- [[2019-al-dawood|Al-Dawood, 2019]] Critical for determining hydrocarbon content and pay zones.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2019-al-dawood|Al-Dawood, 2019]] Estimated via rock physics modeling and neural network inversion.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Gas saturation derived from neural networks showed a matching value of approximately 56% with gas saturation log. ([[2019-al-dawood|Al-Dawood, 2019, p. 100]])
